articles.title: India sets $2 trillion export target in 5 years for 'Atmanirbhar Bharat'
articles.description: Union Minister Piyush Goyal set a $2 trillion export target for the next five years under the 'Atmanirbhar Bharat' initiative. He launched the Bharat Vyapar Mahotsav to scale up indigenous goods and strengthen India's global market presence.

articles.title: NSE Commences Trading In Electronic Gold Receipts Segment: What's This?
articles.description: The exchange says live trading in EGRs began from Monday, May 18, after a successful mock trading session conducted on May 16 without any system issues or exceptions.

articles.title: India-Oman Trade Pact From June 1 To Support $2 Trillion Export Goal: Piyush Goyal
articles.description: India Oman free trade pact takes effect June 1, giving India near full duty free access to Oman, as Piyush Goyal targets 2 trillion dollars exports in five years

articles.title: Office romance exposed: 40 percent admit cheating on partner with co-worker, survey finds
articles.description: A Forbes Advisor survey of 2,000 employees reveals workplace romance is increasingly common, with 43% of colleagues who date eventually getting married and many reporting major career and job impacts

articles.title: Delhi govt’s 'Metro Monday' drive: CM Rekha Gupta, ministers travel by metro to promote fuel saving campaign
articles.description: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta led by example on Monday, travelling by Metro to her office. This initiative, part of the 'Mera Bharat Mera Yogdan' campaign, aims to conserve fuel and reduce pollution. Several other ministers and government officials also opted for public transport. The Delhi government is implementing measures like work-from-home and 'no car day' to promote petroleum conservation.

articles.title: 7th Pay Commission: WB Govt Approves New Pay Panel, Big Salary Hike on the Cards for Employees!
articles.description: Some great news is here for West Bengal's state government employees. The state government has finally decided to set up the 7th Pay Commission. State Minister Agnimitra Pal made the announcement right after a cabinet meeting.

articles.title: Should you book an FD now or wait?
articles.description: Waiting purely in anticipation of a rate revision could mean missing out on the rates currently available in the market

articles.title: How Airtel Beat HDFC Bank To Become 2nd Most Valuable Company By Market Cap
articles.description: Bharti Airtel overtakes HDFC Bank in market value as telecom stocks gain favour on Dalal Street amid a strong growth outlook.

articles.title: Godfrey Phillips share price falls 6% post Q4 results; ₹3 dividend declared
articles.description: Godfrey Phillips share price: Cigarette maker Godfrey Phillips India, along with its Q4 result, recommended a final dividend payout of ₹3.3 per share of ₹2 face value for FY2025-26.

articles.title: From vault to demat: NSE rolls out Electronic Gold Receipts (EGRs) trading
articles.description: An Electronic Gold Receipt (EGR) is a dematerialised instrument that represents ownership of physical gold held in a Sebi-regulated vault

articles.title: Shark Tank India judge Anupam Mittal on Oracle layoffs: The 12,000 were not cut because the ship was sinking. They were because ...
articles.description: Shark Tank India judge Anupam Mittal commented on Oracle's recent layoffs and rescinded job offers, attributing them to automation rather than financial issues. He advised professionals to assess their position on an employer's P&L statement, suggesting those in the 'cost column' are at risk, while those contributing to revenue or profit can leverage AI.

articles.title: J&K stares at water, power crisis amid heatwave conditions
articles.description: The Jammu Power Distribution Corporation Limited (JPDCL) has issued an advisory for the electricity consumers requesting them to use the electricity judiciously.

articles.title: Nifty could slip towards 23,150 if key support breaks: Rupak De
articles.description: Indian equity markets ended last week under pressure, with benchmark indices struggling to hold gains due to weak technical indicators and selling in heavyweight stocks. Analyst Rupak De notes a fragile technical structure for Nifty and Bank Nifty, anticipating further downside. While smallcaps corrected sharply, De sees selective buying opportunities emerging in mid and smallcap segments.

articles.title: BSE set to enter Nifty 50 as Wipro faces ouster in September rejig; one-way flow pegged at $639 million
articles.description: A separate index rebalance is scheduled for June 2026 for the Nifty Next 50, where index weights will be capped — though no additions or deletions are anticipated at this stage

articles.title: India's top IT firms pay record Rs 1 lakh crore dividend even as stocks take a beating
articles.description: TCS, the index's largest constituent, saw its dividend decline 12.7 percent to Rs 39,820 crore in FY26 from Rs 45,588 crore in FY25. Coforge recorded a steeper fall, with its combined payout dropping over 20 percent to Rs 404 crore from Rs 509 crore in the previous fiscal. HCL Technology held its dividend unchanged at Rs 16,290 crore.

articles.title: Stock Radar: Sun Pharma breaks out from falling trendline resistance to hit fresh 52-week high; time to buy?
articles.description: Sun Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd has broken out from a falling trendline resistance on weekly charts, hitting a fresh 52-week high. Experts suggest short-term traders can buy the stock for a target of Rs 1,990 in the next 2-4 months, with a stop loss below Rs 1,690.

articles.title: Mutual funds cut technology sector exposure to 8-year low in April. Is AI disruption reshaping sentiment?
articles.description: Mutual funds have significantly reduced their technology sector exposure to an eight-year low, driven by concerns over AI disruption, slowing global IT spending, and muted earnings. This strategic shift reflects investor caution amid a transition phase for the IT sector, with a preference for domestic sectors like financials and defence.

articles.title: LG Vinai Saxena approves minimum wage hike for Ladakh workers
articles.description: According to the official release, the move will benefit thousands of workers who have been earning as little as ₹300 to ₹500 per month for several years.

articles.title: Dividends, stock splits: L&T, Havells among 15 stocks turning ex-date this week. Check details
articles.description: Investors should note upcoming corporate actions. Several companies including GM Breweries, Havells India, and Larsen & Toubro will turn ex-date for dividends and stock splits. Shareholders must hold shares by the record date to be eligible. This period presents opportunities for investors to track these significant corporate events.

articles.title: Social Security: This 1 Simple Move Could Help You Avoid Taxes on Your Benefits
articles.description: This tax strategy could save you thousands of dollars.

articles.title: Employee tried to leave professionally, gave two weeks��� notice, then HR fired him abruptly, calling it ‘common practice’; ‘Protect yourself,’ career coach warns corporate workers
articles.description: A viral X post highlighted a common workplace imbalance where employees are expected to give advance notice when resigning, but companies may end employment early. An employee reportedly lost a week's pay after being released days into his two-week notice, sparking debate about one-way courtesy in professional departures.

articles.title: 48,741 homes in Amravati benefit from solar scheme

articles.title: Deloitte India aims to become country's biggest professional services firm by 2028
articles.description: Deloitte India is on track to claim the title of the nation's premier professional services provider by 2028, fueled by an expansion strategy that includes doubling its workforce to 100,000 and aiming for $5 billion in revenue. Through Project Bharat, the firm is not only targeting larger corporations but also reaching out to small businesses and innovative startups.

articles.title: Are More Hikes In Fuel Prices Coming? Keep Following Timesnownews.com For All The Latest Updates As Fuel Prices Climb Up
articles.description: India saw its first fuel price increase in over four years, with petrol and diesel rising by Rs 3 per litre due to elevated global crude oil prices and supply disruptions from the ongoing Iran war. But is the latest price hike is the final one or just the first installment.

articles.title: NHAI flags use of tampered number plates to evade toll
articles.description: New Delhi: Seeking to curb the menace of people tampering with their vehicle's number plates — such as erasing or hiding letters and numbers using pap.

articles.title: ET Graphics: BoP stability tested by outflows & Rupee fall
articles.description: India's external accounts are under strain. The current account deficit is widening, and capital may flow out. The rupee has weakened significantly. Policymakers are considering various measures beyond interest rate hikes to stabilize the currency. These include incentives for foreign deposits and liberalizing capital inflows. State-owned banks may also issue foreign currency bonds.

articles.title: Strong digital business boosts ENIL FY26 revenue 3.9% to Rs 565 crore
articles.description: Entertainment Network India, or ENIL, saw its revenue climb to ₹565 crore in FY26. This growth was powered by its digital business, which expanded significantly. The company's radio advertising market faced challenges. ENIL's digital segment now contributes substantially to its overall revenue. The company maintained a strong financial position and recommended a dividend.
